SETTINGS.TITLE: AI assistant (fork)
SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure an OpenAI-compatible API key, optional base URL, and default chat model for this account. Keys are stored in a separate table (not on accounts).
SETTINGS.API_BASE_PLACEHOLDER: Leave empty for default (OpenAI), or e.g. https://api.openai.com
SETTINGS.SYSTEM_INSTRUCTIONS_PLACEHOLDER: How the assistant should behave in conversations (tone, policies, what to avoid). This text is combined with FAQs when building context for future chat features.
SETTINGS.SYSTEM_INSTRUCTIONS_HINT: Used as system-style guidance together with FAQs from the FAQs page.
SETTINGS.TOKEN_HINT: A token is already saved (ends with {hint}). Leave blank to keep it.

ASSISTANTS.TITLE: Assistants
ASSISTANTS.EMPTY: Create an assistant to organize FAQs and context for your team.

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete assistant?
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: This removes the assistant and all of its FAQs for this account:

DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Name your assistant, describe its purpose, and optionally set a product name. Feature toggles are stored for future use.
DIALOG.PRODUCT_NAME_PLACEHOLDER: Product or area this assistant supports
DIALOG.FEATURE_MEMORY: Capture key customer details as memories (reserved)

FAQS.TITLE: FAQs for context
FAQS.DESCRIPTION: Add question and answer pairs. They are appended to the AI instructions when your integration builds conversation context (see Instructions on the Configuration page).
FAQS.SCOPE_HINT: These entries apply only to this assistant. New FAQs are saved for the assistant in the URL.
FAQS.MODAL_ASSISTANT_NOTE: This FAQ is saved for “{name}”. To add FAQs for another assistant, go back to Assistants and open that assistant’s FAQ page.
FAQS.MODAL_DESCRIPTION: Add a question and a rich-text answer. This content is sent to the model as reference context.
FAQS.EMPTY: No FAQs yet. Add entries your team can rely on when assisting customers.
FAQS.QUESTION_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. What is your refund policy?
FAQS.ANSWER_PLACEHOLDER: Rich text answer shown to the model as reference.

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete FAQ?
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: This removes the FAQ from AI context for this account:

FAQS_PICK.TITLE: Which assistant?
FAQS_PICK.DESCRIPTION: FAQs are stored per assistant. Choose one, then open its FAQ list.
FAQS_PICK.EMPTY: No assistants yet. Create an assistant first, then open FAQs again from the sidebar.

PLAYGROUND.TITLE: Playground
PLAYGROUND.INTRO: Use this playground to send messages to your assistant and check that it answers accurately, quickly, and in the tone you expect.
PLAYGROUND.HINT: Messages are not saved on the server after you leave this page.
PLAYGROUND.EMPTY_THREAD: Write a message below to start.
PLAYGROUND.INPUT_PLACEHOLDER: Type a customer question or scenario…

PLAYGROUND_PICK.TITLE: Playground — choose an assistant
PLAYGROUND_PICK.DESCRIPTION: Pick which assistant you want to test in the playground.
PLAYGROUND_PICK.EMPTY: No assistants yet. Create an assistant first, then open Playground again from the sidebar.
